message:
feat(io): add usecols, nrows, skiprows, and dtype options to CSV reader

Extend CsvReadOptions with four new pandas-compatible parameters:
- usecols: read only named columns (None = all)
- nrows: maximum data rows to read (None = all)
- skiprows: skip N initial data rows after header
- dtype: force specific DType per column name

Wire all four into read_csv_with_options for both header and no-header
modes. Apply dtype coercion after initial parsing. Add tests for each
parameter individually and in combination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
